form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 6th on April 8 over 390m at Ballarat behind Blackpool Iris beaten 10 lengths (22.72) in a R/A FIN. Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 6th on April 8 over 390m at Ballarat behind Blackpool Iris beaten 10 lengths (22.72) in a R/A FIN. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Grade 4/5 on March 2 over 390m at Ballarat behind Galloping Happy beaten 12 lengths (22.82). Had won two on end prior to the latest effort. Can atone.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last in a Grade 4/5 on March 2 over 390m at Ballarat behind Galloping Happy beaten 12 lengths (22.82). Had won two on end prior to the latest effort. Can atone.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (17.13) at this track over 300m. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (17.13) at this track over 300m. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Warragul to win by 0.8 lengths in 26.42, beating Miss Bella Babe. Last start finished last over 435m at Sale beaten 8 lengths (24.91) behind Spicy La Vida in a Grade 5 on January 3. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Sandown over 515m. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Sandown over 515m. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide entering home straight.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 525m at The Meadows behind So He Thinks beaten 15 lengths (31.06). Placed two back at The Meadows. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 525m at The Meadows behind So He Thinks beaten 15 lengths (31.06). Placed two back at The Meadows. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (30.45) in a Grade 5, finishing a 13 length sixth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (30.45) in a Grade 5, finishing a 13 length sixth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.93) when fourth over 435m at Sale in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and five places from 10 starts. Looks a place chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (24.93) when fourth over 435m at Sale in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and five places from 10 starts. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth on April 8 over 510m at Sale behind Lose My Mind, beaten 9 lengths (29.26) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when third (20.06) at Q Lakeside, making it two placings on end. Will need plenty of luck.
